challenges.title: Mega Menu
challenges.description: Create a mega menu dropdown that spans the full width of the page with multiple columns of links.
hints: Set the dropdown to width: 100% or a large fixed width
Use CSS columns or flexbox for column layout
Position it relative to the nav bar, not the parent li

challenges.title: Accordion Dropdown
challenges.description: Build a CSS-only accordion that uses :focus or :target to toggle dropdown content open/close.
hints: Use the :focus-within pseudo-class on the parent
Or use the :target pseudo-class with anchors
Set max-height transition for smooth animation

challenges.title: Dropdown with Icons
challenges.description: Create a dropdown menu where each item has an icon aligned left and text, with a hover highlight effect.
hints: Use flexbox to align icon and text in each link
Style the hover state with a left border accent
